mapper.select: select sessionId from session where sessionId in (select sessionId from session_user where userId = #{userId}) order by lastTime desc;
select id as friendId, username as friendName from user where id in (select userId from session_user where sessionId = #{sessionId} and userId != #{selfUserId});
mapper.update: update session set lastTime = now() where sessionId = (select s1.sessionId from session_user s1 join session_user s2 on s1.userId=#{userId} and s2.userId=#{toUserId} and s1.sessionId = s2.sessionId);
